registry_row_zh.理想任务类型: 通信网络异常检测、root-cause QA
registry_row_zh.理由: 少见的公开 observability KPI + anomaly/root-cause/description/Q&A 数据，文本和时序已经整理好。

ts_source: AliMaatouk/TelecomTS on Hugging Face — 18 KPI channels at 10 Hz (100 ms), 128-step windows
text_source: description field (dataset authors, real) + anomalies.troubleshooting_tickets (GPT-4.1 generated per paper)
pairing_method: One record per sample window: description (+ troubleshooting ticket for anomalies) paired with 5 selected KPI time series; normal and anomaly record types separated
effort_estimate: 4–8 h for CPT export script; flagged for team-lead review due to GPT-generated anomaly text
probe_notes: HF dataset loads via streaming. 128 timesteps × 18 KPIs per sample. labels: zone, application, mobility, congestion. anomalies.troubleshooting_tickets holds GPT-style root-cause prose. ~25% anomaly / ~75% normal in sampled rows.
caveats: Controlled 5G lab testbed — not live production telemetry
Anomaly events are mathematically injected into real measurements
Anomaly troubleshooting tickets are GPT-4.1 generated — must tag text_quality: generated
Description text is real but scenario-level statistical summary, not operator prose
Several KPI channels are zero-inflated or sparse (protocol fields, packet counts)
